caption:
53% of mobile users abandon a site that takes more than 3 seconds to load.

Read that again.

More than half your potential customers — gone — before they even see your business.

Speed isn't a tech detail. It's a revenue decision.

bienzoli sites load in under 1 second on mobile. That's not a claim — that's a PageSpeed score of 95+, verified and documented.

Your competitor's WordPress site? 6–8 seconds.

Every second costs you customers. 📉

→ bienzoli.com — Performance is non-negotiable.

#WebPerformance #MobileFirst #ConversionRate #MauritiusBusiness
